name: D1 转录与翻译（中心法则）
subject: biology
domain_name: 主题 D · 连续性与变化 Continuity and Change
curriculum_points:
A1.1.5—Solvent properties of water linked to its role as a medium for metabolism and for transport in plants and animals
Emphasize that a wide variety of hydrophilic molecules dissolve in water and that most enzymes catalyse reactions in aqueous solution. Students should also understand that the functions of some molecules in cells depend on them being hydrophobic and insoluble.

B1.1.8—Hydrophobic properties of lipids
Lipids are substances in living organisms that dissolve in non-polar solvents but are only sparingly soluble in aqueous solvents. Lipids include fats, oils, waxes and steroids.

B1.2.10—Effect of polar and non-polar amino acids on tertiary structure of proteins
In proteins that are soluble in water, hydrophobic amino acids are clustered in the core of globular proteins. Integral proteins have regions with hydrophobic amino acids, helping them to embed in membranes.

B2.1.12—Formation of phospholipid bilayers as a consequence of the hydrophobic and hydrophilic regions
Students should use and understand the term “amphipathic”.

errors.description: 只记年代与名词，不能用史料与制度变迁解释历史进程。
把传说叙述与考古/文献证据混为一谈，未区分证据强度。

exercises.stem: 结合课标要求，说明「D1 转录与翻译（中心法则）」的核心内涵，并各举一条史料或史实依据。
exercises.answer: 应答扣课标要点：A1.1.5—Solvent properties of water linked to its role as a medium for metabolism and for transport in plants and animals…；并区分证据类型（文献/考古/制度等）。

exercises.stem:
用因果链解释：B1.1.8—Hydrophobic properties of lipids
Lipids are substances in living organism… 对理解「D1 转录与翻译（中心法则）」为何重要？
exercises.answer: 需写出前因—制度/经济/思想变化—后果，避免只罗列年代。
